name: Abstract Public Holidays
tagline: Look up public, regional, and religious holidays worldwide
description: Retrieve national, regional, and religious holidays for a country, optionally filtered by year, month, day, or holiday type.

auth.hint: Sign up at abstractapi.com for a Holidays API key and send it as the api_key query parameter.

tools.name: list_holidays
tools.description: List public, regional, and religious holidays for a country, optionally filtered by date or holiday type.

params.name: country
params.description: Two-letter country code, for example SG for Singapore.

params.name: year
params.description: Year to retrieve holidays for; supports historical and future dates from 1 AD through 2050 and beyond.

params.name: type
params.description: Holiday classification filter, for example National.
